wage_violation_base_rate.source: Jan Sahas, 'Voices of the Invisible Citizens' (2020); ILO India Employment Report (ILO-IHD, 2024)
wage_violation_base_rate.note: Share of informal workers paid below the notified minimum wage for their sector. Casual/piece-rate work has the highest violation rates.

wage_violation_modifiers.source: ILO India Employment Report 2024; Jan Sahas 2020; PLFS 2023-24
wage_violation_modifiers.note: Multiplicative risk modifiers applied on top of the base rate.

rights_awareness_beta.source: ILO India Employment Report 2024 (contract <-> rights awareness); workers with written contracts ~3x more rights-aware.
rights_awareness_beta.note: Beta(a,b) prior on a 0-1 rights-awareness score by contract type, nudged up by education.

ai_usability.source: GSMA Mobile Internet Connectivity Report 2024 (India); NFHS-5 digital-access gradients.
ai_usability.note: 1-5 score for how usable a text/voice AI tool is for the worker, from education minus low-resource-language and rural penalties.
